subcodes.first_line: In this day the Sun of Truth hath risen and the Mount of Knowledge hath been made vocal through the utterance of the Divine Speaker. Blessed are they who hearken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز آفتاب حقیقت مشرق و طور عرفان بظهور مکلم ناطق طوبی از برای نفوسیکه اذکار
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
